'''Alex Gerrard''' (born 5 November 1991) is an English [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|pr}} and {{rlp|lf}} for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]].

He has previously played for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] and [[Super League]], and on loan from [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] at the [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[RFL League 1|League 1]]. Gerrard has also played for the [[Mackay Cutters]] in the [[Queensland Cup]].

He made his début for the first team in the [[2010 Challenge Cup]] 5th round tie against the [[Wigan Warriors]].<ref>{{cite web|url= http://www.cheshire-today.co.uk/sport/alex-gerrard-extends-widnes-vikings-contract|archive-url= https://archive.today/20130419220916/http://www.cheshire-today.co.uk/sport/alex-gerrard-extends-widnes-vikings-contract|url-status = dead|archive-date= 19 April 2013|title= Alex Gerrard extends Widnes Vikings contract|date= 22 February 2013|accessdate= 3 April 2013}}</ref>

[[Salford Red Devils]] confirmed on 3 Feb 24 that he had left the club.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=3 Feb 2024|title=Salford Red Devils confirm departure of veteran forward on back of squad numbers omission|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/salford-red-devils-confirm-departure-of-veteran-forward-on-back-of-squad-numbers-omission}}</ref>
